scripts.dev: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');try{const r=execSync('Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen 2>$null | Select-Object -Expand OwningProcess',{shell:'powershell.exe'}).toString().trim();if(r){execSync('Stop-Process -Id '+r+' -Force',{shell:'powershell.exe'});console.log('Freed port 5000 (PID '+r+')')}}catch(e){}" && nodemon server.js
scripts.kill: powershell -Command "$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -EA SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if($p){Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Host 'Killed PID' $p}else{Write-Host 'Port 5000 is free'}"
